loop_goal: Inspect, review, implement, validate, fix, and revalidate the lifecycle-traceability through release_readiness slice before stable release promotion.

stages.findings_summary: The reference and starter-workspace lifecycle traces were inspected as one bounded V6 release claim through release_readiness.
stages.exit_condition: Both lifecycle traces are explicit enough to review as one bounded V6 slice.

stages.findings_summary: The selected V6 claim is correctly bounded to release_readiness and does not overstate launch or outcome coverage.
stages.exit_condition: The promoted claim stays tightly scoped to lifecycle traceability through release_readiness.

stages.findings_summary: Parity, focus-area coverage, stage-shape, and scope-boundary checks agree on the selected V6 lifecycle-traceability slice.
stages.exit_condition: Automated parity, focus-area, and scope-boundary proof passes for both the reference and starter workspaces.

stages.findings_summary: The repo exposes lifecycle traceability through release_readiness as an explicit V6 build slice and closes the trace command contract gap.
stages.exit_condition: The selected V6 slice exists concretely in the repo and can be validated and promoted.

stages.findings_summary: The release package leaves launch, outcomes, and external publication adapters as explicit deferred work instead of hidden scope.
stages.exit_condition: Deferred work is explicit and does not leak into the promoted V6 claim.

stages.findings_summary: Manual review confirms the selected V6 lifecycle-traceability slice is ready to become the stable ProductOS baseline.
stages.exit_condition: One explicit proceed decision exists and no unresolved blocking disagreement remains.

manual_review_summary: The V6 release is acceptable because it promotes one concrete lifecycle-traceability slice through release_readiness, fixes the trace focus-area contract gap, keeps launch and outcome stages explicitly out of scope, and uses the starter workspace as the clean adoption surface.
next_action: Promote ProductOS to V6.0.0 stable and plan the next bounded lifecycle expansion beyond release_readiness.
